title: Friends+
description: A pack created with the intent to live in the game, not just play it.
body: This modpack was made for me and my friends to play together on a Hardcore survival world. It includes smaller mods such as Beautify: Refabricated and larger mods such as Create, Fabric Seasons, and Zenith. I love creating modpacks that make minecraft feel more alive, so I thought, "Why not share it with the world?"
